description: Alexis Ohanian discusses the evolution of Reddit and the potential of decentralized technology at Breakpoint 2021. He announces a $50 million investment in social projects built on Solana, emphasizing the importance of community and connection in technology.
topic_summary: At [t=17:28], Alexis Ohanian shares insights on building a new Internet and the role of community in technology. He reflects on his journey with Reddit and announces a $50 million investment in Solana projects at [t=169:08].
